title: merremia cespitosa
intro: Merremia cespitosa, also known as the "thorny morning glory", is a type of flowering vine native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Merremia cespitosa include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
